description: First-class UE C++ authoring: type-aware UCLASS/USTRUCT/UENUM/UINTERFACE creation with correct MODULENAME_API + GENERATED_BODY + .generated.h placement, reflection-aware UPROPERTY/UFUNCTION/include inserts (no byte ranges from caller), .Build.cs dependency editing, header introspection, file read/write/edit with auto-fix of lowercase reflection macros, project compile, and native engine source search.
catalog_blurb: UE C++ class authoring, reflection-aware edits, module/.Build.cs management, header summaries, project compile.
